infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Clique uses your calendar to let you save and share events with friends.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsFullAccessUsageDescription: Clique uses your calendar to let you save and share events with friends.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsWriteOnlyAccessUsageDescripti: Clique uses your calendar to let you save and share events with friends.
infoPlist.NSRemindersUsageDescription: Clique uses reminders to help you keep track of plans with friends.
infoPlist.NSRemindersFullAccessUsageDescription: Clique uses reminders to help you keep track of plans with friends.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Clique to access your photos so you can set a profile picture.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Clique to access your camera so you can scan barcodes to add books and movies to My Collection.
